catalog_content:
Item Name: Miso Caesar Dressing (Pack of 3) – Seed Oil Free Salad Dressing Made w/Avocado Oil – Refined Sugar Free, Dairy & Gluten Free Dip & Marinade – Paleo Honey Mustard Dressing for Dips, Sauces - SideDish
Bullet Point 1: Caesar Dressing Pack: Elevate your culinary creations with this dairy free dip crafted with love and clean ingredients. This gluten free salad dressing is made using heart-healthy avocado oil, non-GMO chickpea miso paste, zesty lemon, and hints of garlic and dijon. Our dressings have Seed Oil Free.
Bullet Point 2: Dairy and Sugar-Free: This lemon salad dressing is dairy, gluten, nut, seed oils, and refined-sugar free. Use the simple ingredients and bold flavors of our coleslaw dressing, to enhance the nourishing meal.
Bullet Point 3: Healthy Lifestyle: Our gluten-free miso dressing pack, consisting of three 8 Oz sauce bottles, provides a healthy lifestyle option. This healthy salad dressing offers both flavor and nutrition without compromising your dietary preferences.
Bullet Point 4: Freshness and Flavor: Refrigerate our gluten free dressing after opening and consume within 60 days for maximum flavor and freshness. Separation of our sandwich sauce is normal without any unnatural emulsifiers. Shake it before use.
Bullet Point 5: Versatile Use: Use our miso salad dressing as a dipping sauce, marinade, and more. Create tasty dishes by using our dressing as an alternative to creamy caesar salad dressing, spread for a wrap, or a condiment for dinner recipes.
Value: 24.0
Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Mid-tier specialty salad dressing positioned as a health-conscious alternative to traditional creamy Caesar dressings. The pack-of-three format with glass bottles suggests a balance between convenience and perceived quality, while the absence of seed oils, refined sugar, and dairy aligns with niche dietary preferences. Branding emphasizes 'natural' and 'clean ingredients,' justifying a premium price over commodity dressings but not luxury positioning.
